description: You have joined a team working on a data processing library. Import the existing Gradle project located at /home/ga/projects/datautils into Eclipse. Add the Google Guava dependency (com.google.guava:guava:33.0.0-jre) to the project's build configuration. In the package com.datautils.util, implement a utility class named CollectionHelper using Guava's ImmutableList and ImmutableMap. The class must include: a static method immutableListOf(T... elements) returning an ImmutableList, a static method immutableMapOf(K k1, V v1, K k2, V v2) returning an ImmutableMap, and a static method concat(List<T> first, List<T> second) that combines two lists using an ImmutableList builder. Verify that the project builds successfully.
